steps.title: Model the line of best fit
steps.content: Read two points on the line of best fit, not on random scatterplot points. The line passes approximately through $(24,10)$ and $(34,0)$.

steps.title: Predict at x = 25.5
steps.content: The fitted line has slope about $-1$ and equation $y\approx -x+34$. At $x=25.5$, the predicted value is $y\approx -25.5+34=8.5$.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The answer choice closest to $8.5$ is $8.2$. That matches choice C.
